instruction: I’m trying to put together an all-black going-out outfit and want you to build it around a dress first so I can see whether the whole look feels cohesive. On Princess Polly, find a black short party dress in size Medium that’s actually available for delivery, open the product page so you can verify the size and delivery status, and leave that tab open because I want the dress to be the anchor piece. Then go to DemoniaCult and find a black Mary Jane shoe that would work with that dress, making sure size 9 or 9.5 is available on the actual product page, and open the best option in its own tab so I can compare the vibe side by side with the dress; please note exactly which of those sizes you found in stock. After that, go to Edikted and pick a dark brown leather oversized jacket without a hood to use as the outer layer, and open the actual product page so I can visually confirm it fits the look. At the end, send me a short outfit summary with the product names and links for all three items, include the dress and shoe prices, and mention the shoe size availability you found on DemoniaCult.
